narrative: Iran warns of harsh response and threatens Strait of Hormuz closure, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as WTI crude firmed 1.57% toward $103.5. USD/JPY holds at 156.92 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets risk-premium demand; gold lower -1.25% near $4,587; equities +0.29%; DXY +0.09%; VIX 17.5. Watch the RBA Monetary Policy Statement at 04:30 UTC tomorrow for AUD direction.
